messages.content:
When mapping a drive, you can type in the path to the shared folder on the host computer.  What is the syntax for the path?
Question 36 options:

\\sharedfolder\server

\server\sharedfolder

\\server\sharedfolder

/sharedfolder/server

The correct syntax for the path when mapping a drive to a shared folder on the host computer is:

\\server\sharedfolder

If you see an error message that reads “Processor thermal trip error”, what is the likely problem?
Question 37 options:

the power supply is inadequate

the processor has overheated

the processor has failed

a memory module might be bad

The likely problem when an error message reads “Processor thermal trip error” is:

the processor has overheated

Question 38 (1 point) 

Listen
Which partition is the bootable partition that startup BIOS turns to when searching for an operating system to start up?
Question 38 options:

extended partition

startup partition

active partition

volume
Question 39 (1 point) 

Listen
Which Windows utility can be used to find out what processes are launched at startup?
Question 39 options:

Task Manager

Microsoft Management Console

System Configuration

Computer Management
Question 40 (1 point) 

Listen
Which of the following will provide the FASTEST boot times for a laptop user?
Question 40 options:

Solid state drive

Li-Po battery

eSATA hard drive

Increased RAM

Question 38: The bootable partition that startup BIOS turns to when searching for an operating system to start up is the **active partition**.

Question 39: The Windows utility used to find out what processes are launched at startup is **System Configuration** (often accessed using the command "msconfig").

Question 40: The option that will provide the FASTEST boot times for a laptop user is a **Solid state drive (SSD)**.

____ is a language used to communicate how a page is to print and was developed by Adobe Systems.
Question 41 options:

PCL

JCL

PostScript

GDI
Question 42 (1 point) 

Listen
Which of the following encryption types is the LEAST secure?
Question 42 options:

WPA

AES

TKIP

WEP
Question 43 (1 point) 

Listen
Name the Windows RE command that can be used to manage hard drives, partitions, and volumes.
Question 43 options:

wpeinit

bootrec

bdcedit

diskpart

Question 41: The language used to communicate how a page is to print and was developed by Adobe Systems is **PostScript**.

Question 42: Among the listed encryption types, **WEP** (Wired Equivalent Privacy) is the LEAST secure.

Question 43: The Windows RE (Recovery Environment) command that can be used to manage hard drives, partitions, and volumes is **diskpart**.

A keyboard has been replaced on a laptop. Which of the following is the MOST likely cause that the keyboard does not work?
Question 44 options:

The keyboard data cable was not connected properly

The keyboard is not compatible with the laptop

The keyboard needs updated drivers

The keyboard is defective
Question 45 (1 point) 

Listen
Which of the following is true about moving a hard drive from a non-working computer to a working computer for the purposes of accessing the data on the drive?
Question 45 options:

you must install the drive in a drive bay

you must manually assign a drive letter

you must have an Administrator password before you can access the data on the drive

the drive must be initialized before you can access it
Question 46 (1 point) 

Listen
What is another name for several small utility programs that are found in the Control Panel?
Question 46 options:

downloads

system processes

categories

applets
Question 47 (1 point) 

Listen
Which type of device is most likely to have a slot for an SD card?
Question 47 options:

iPod Touch

Android smart phone

iPhone

iPad
Question 48 (1 point) 

Listen
Garbled characters on output pages may indicate a printing problem related to which of the following?

Question 48 options:

Calibration


Printer driver


Fuser assembly


Imaging drum

Question 49 (1 point) 

Listen
Which attribute is used to hide a file so that it does not appear in the directory list?
Question 49 options:

Archive

Hidden

Read-only

System
Question 50 (1 point) 

Listen
Which Task Manager tab allows you to show processes from all users to verify no applications are running under that user account?
Question 50 options:

Processes tab

Users tab

Networking tab

Performance tab

Question 44: The MOST likely cause that the keyboard does not work after being replaced on a laptop is **The keyboard data cable was not connected properly**.

Question 45: The correct statement about moving a hard drive from a non-working computer to a working computer for the purposes of accessing the data on the drive: **you must install the drive in a drive bay**. (Note: Accessing the data might also require ensuring the system recognizes the drive, but this doesn't always involve assigning a drive letter manually, initializing the drive, or having an Administrator password, depending on the state of the drive and the setup.)

Question 46: Another name for several small utility programs that are found in the Control Panel is **applets**.

Question 47: The type of device most likely to have a slot for an SD card is **Android smart phone**.

Question 48: Garbled characters on output pages may indicate a printing problem related to **Printer driver**.

Question 49: The attribute used to hide a file so that it does not appear in the directory list is **Hidden**.

Question 50: The Task Manager tab that allows you to show processes from all users to verify no applications are running under that user account is the **Processes tab** (when viewed in versions prior to Windows 8/10/11). In Windows 8/10/11, this functionality has been integrated into the "Details" tab, and you might need to click "More details" first, then check the option to see processes from all users, typically requiring administrative privileges.

Which key should be pressed during the boot in order to display the Advanced Boot Options?
Question 51 options:

F4

F8

F10

F12
The key that should be pressed during the boot in order to display the Advanced Boot Options is **F8**.

A network administrator has a requirement to implement a Wi-Fi hot-spot for the public.
Which of the following should be used for secure access?
Question 52 options:

WEP and TKIP

WPA2 and AES

WPA and static IPs

WPA2 and MAC filtering

For implementing a secure Wi-Fi hot-spot for the public, the administrator should use **WPA2 and AES**. This combination provides strong encryption and is considered secure, making it suitable for protecting the network.

Which Windows tool allows an administrator to decrypt a file that is not available because the user account that encrypted the file is no longer accessible?
Question 54 options:

Windows Defender

Windows File Protection

Cipher

Backup and Restore

The Windows tool that allows an administrator to decrypt a file when the user account that encrypted the file is no longer accessible is **Cipher**. The Cipher command-line tool can be used with various switches to manage encryption and decryption of data on NTFS volumes.

Which of the following is required in order for BitLocker to be enabled?
Question 55 options:

Drive encryption

Group Policy

Trusted platform module

Power-on Password
Question 56 (1 point) 
 Saved

Listen
Which Windows 10 feature allows you to roll back a device driver to a previous version?

Question 56 options:

System Restore


Device Manager


Windows Update


Control Panel

Question 55: For BitLocker to be enabled, a **Trusted Platform Module (TPM)** is required. BitLocker is a full disk encryption feature included with Windows, designed to protect data by providing encryption for entire volumes. A TPM is a specialized chip on an endpoint device that stores RSA encryption keys specific to the host system for hardware authentication.

Question 56: The Windows 10 feature that allows you to roll back a device driver to a previous version is **Device Manager**. Within Device Manager, you can access the properties of a device, and under the Driver tab, you have the option to "Roll Back Driver", provided there is a previous driver version to revert to.
